title: Pacific Cell Components Supply Agreement
summary: Primary lithium battery cell supplier with 12-day standard lead time, 5-day delay notification requirement, and penalties for delays above 5 business days.
future_retrieval_use: Stage 3 will ingest full supplier contract text into ChromaDB.

title: Atlas Energy Materials Secondary Supply Agreement
summary: Approved secondary lithium battery cell supplier with 5-day expedited lead time and 8 percent expected cost premium.
future_retrieval_use: Stage 3 will use this supplier as a mitigation option in retrieval-backed reasoning.
